name: Uncontrolled Hardware
text: AI-capable chips are being manufactured and sold globally without tracking. Buyers in non-signatory nations acquired enough hardware for frontier-scale training. At least one training run has completed.
image-prompt: Endless rows of boxed AI accelerator chips stacked in an unmarked warehouse, forklifts moving pallets toward waiting trucks at loading docks, anonymous industrial setting under harsh fluorescent lighting, digital painting, no text
